mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyI18n :: selectById */ i.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_is.code_label AS i18n_scope_cd_nm FROM sy_i18n i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_is ON cd_is.code_grp = 'I18N_SCOPE' AND cd_is.code_value = i.i18n_scope_cd WHERE i.i18n_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.sy :: SyI18n :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_i18n i
